hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); TYPE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.notification_type // "unknown"'); MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message // "Needs attention"'); case $TYPE in permission_prompt) PREFIX="PERMISSION";; idle_prompt) PREFIX="INPUT NEEDED";; elicitation_dialog) PREFIX="QUESTION";; *) PREFIX="ACTION";; esac; curl -s -d "$PREFIX: $MSG" ntfy.sh/YOUR_TOPIC_HERE > /dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
